services.card_tagline: Choose from our 3 exclusive meeting rooms – where functionality meets inspiration and focus flows naturally.
services.meta_description: Exclusive meeting rooms for your team.
services.page_subtitle: At GROVEside, our meeting rooms are designed to inspire productivity and collaboration, equipped with state-of-the-art technology and flexible layouts to suit your needs.

services.card_tagline: Host your corporate event in a private, nature-infused setting designed to inspire and impress.
Relax after a long day in one of our 8 versatile rooms – crafted for comfort, rest and a sense of ease.
services.page_subtitle: At GROVEside, every stay is designed for comfort, productivity and relaxation. Whether you are here for a short business trip or an extended stay, our thoughtfully designed rooms provide everything you need to feel at home.

one_price_concepts.headline: One Price Concept
one_price_concepts.body: We keep it simple: rentals include complimentary access to coffee, tea, sparkling and still water. Catering options are available for your convenience and can be tailored to suit your needs, with any catering services billed separately.
one_price_concepts.inclusions_body: At GROVEside, we offer complete flexibility to create the ideal environment for you. Our spaces can be arranged in any layout to suit your needs, with options for breakout rooms and additional areas for smaller group sessions or private conversations.

one_price_concepts.headline: One-Price Concept
one_price_concepts.body: Our approach simplifies your experience: enjoy your time with us without worrying about hidden fees.
one_price_concepts.inclusions_body: Everything you need to work, relax and recharge is available to you, all with one transparent price (see section What's Included).
one_price_concepts.catering_note: Catering options are available for your convenience and can be tailored to suit your needs, with any catering services billed separately.
